---
title: "Pupil Size Is a Marker of Intelligence"

pub-authors:
  - Tsukahara
  - Burgoyne
  - Engle

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-06-01"
venue: "Scientific American Mind"
pub-type: "Popular Writing"
pub-status: "Published"

categories:
  - pupillometry
  - locus-coeruleus

pdf: "https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/pupil-size-is-a-marker-of-intelligence/"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: ""

project:
  - ac-brain

listing-page: false
format: html
---
